subject: fix(icon): update icon colour from Pico cyan to DaisyUI coffee primary
body:
Icon colour #0ab1b1 (Pico CSS cyan) no longer matches the warm
caramellatte/coffee palette after migrating to Tailwind v4 + DaisyUI v5.
Updated to #db924c (coffee theme primary, warm amber/gold) which has
good contrast on both light and dark backgrounds.

Tags: icon, theme, design
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: css-migration
Semver: patch
